# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-admin
spec:
  components:
    ingressGateways:
      - name: istio-ingressgateway
        enabled: true
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        adminPort: 15000
    pilot:
      configMap: true
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      injectLabel: istio-injection
      rewriteAppHTTPProbers: true
    telemetry:
      v2:
        prometheus:
          configMap: true
        stackdriver:
          configMap: true
    meshConfig:
      defaultConfig:
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
        concurrency: 2
        statsConfig:
          statsTags:
            - name: cluster
              tagValue:
                literal:
                  value: istio-ingressgateway
            - name: service
              tagValue:
                literal:
                  value: istio-ingressgateway
            - name: version
              tagValue:
                literal:
                  value: latest
            - name: pod
              tagValue:
                literal:
                  value: istio-ingressgateway
            - name: namespace
              tagValue:
                literal:
                  value: istio-system
        tracing:
          zipkin:
            address: zipkin.istio-system.svc.cluster.local:9411
          lightstep:
            accessToken: ""
          jaeger:
            endpoint: ""
          stackdriver:
            debug: false
            maxNumberOfAnnotations: 200
            maxNumberOfAttributes: 200
            maxNumberOfLinks: 200
        proxyStatsMatcher:
          inclusionPrefixes:
            - istio_request_duration_milliseconds
            - istio_request_bytes
            - istio_response_bytes
            - istio_request_total
            - istio_response_total
            - istio_request_duration_seconds
            - istio_request_duration_seconds_bucket
            - istio_request_duration_seconds_sum
            - istio_request_duration_seconds_count
            - istio_request_bytes_bucket
            - istio_request_bytes_sum
            - istio_request_bytes_count
            - istio_response_bytes_bucket
            - istio_response_bytes_sum
            - istio_response_bytes_count
            - istio_request_total_bucket
            - istio_request_total_sum
            - istio_request_total_count
            - istio_response_total_bucket
            - istio_response_total_sum
            - istio_response_total_count
            - istio_request_duration_seconds_count
            - istio_request_duration_seconds_sum
            - istio_request_duration_seconds_bucket
            - istio_request_duration_seconds

            - istio_request_bytes_bucket
